name: similar_grid_2
initial_prompt:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
$GRID$
q_reprompt: Now ask a question in order to find out new aspects of my grid that may be different to your grid. Start with "QUESTION:" and do not add anything else.
d_reprompt: Now come to a decision. What do you think: are your grid and the other grid described the same?  Write "DECISION: same grid" if you think they are the same grid or "DECISION: different grids" if you think they are different grids. Do not add anything else.
a_request: Start your answer with "ANSWER:" and do not add anything else.

0.note: To properly work for other languages than English, the language of the chat template has to be adjusted! Copy this entry and replace 'chat_template_language' with the appropriate language code (e.g. 'HU' for Hungarian) and adjust the 'model_name' accordingly.
